headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Rises As Iran Move Trumps U.S. Pause; Meta, These Titans Breaking Down
summary: Futures fell as Iran turned back ships at the Strait of Hormuz even as Trump extended a deadline. Meta, Microsoft and Google are breaking down.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Rises As Iran Move Trumps U.S. Pause; Meta, These Titans Breaking Down
raw.summary: Futures fell as Iran turned back ships at the Strait of Hormuz even as Trump extended a deadline. Meta, Microsoft and Google are breaking down.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise On Trump's Pause, But U.S. Mulls Sending More Troops; Meta, These Titans Breaking Down
summary: The stock market sold off, with the Nasdaq undercutting recent lows on President Trump's Iran war comments. Meta, Microsoft and Google are breaking down.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise On Trump's Pause, But U.S. Mulls Sending More Troops; Meta, These Titans Breaking Down
